title: ficus neriifolia var. fieldingii
intro: Ficus neriifolia var. fieldingii, also known as Fielding's banyan or Australian banyan, is a type of fig tree native to Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ficus neriifolia var. fieldingii include relief from fever, skin issues, and respiratory problems, while also exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the tree are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments.
